systemPrompt: Chained flaky tools. If a step fails, regenerate the plan and retry the same step without using the failed variable.

tools.flakyAdd: Adds numbers but may fail the first time.
tools.flakyUppercase: Uppercases text but may fail the first time.

prompt: Add 1 and 4 with flakyAdd (retry if it says to), convert 'done' to uppercase with flakyUppercase, then concatenate the sum and text as '<sum>: <text>'.
